body.title: D273 self-healing startup scripts — igor.sh/ps1/bat with crash recovery
body.result: igor script: stderr captured to temp file, clean exits (0/130/143) break loop, crashes check debug_session.flag, if absent launch claude auto-fixer then continue; main.py SIGTERM handler exits 0; context-load writes flag, savestate deletes it. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Rewrite igor startup as proper scripts (igor.sh, igor.ps1, igor.bat) with igor alias. Exit 42=restart, 0=stop, else: capture traceback from stderr, check for ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/debug_session.flag, if absent launch claude --dangerously-skip-permissions with traceback to fix+commit+exit, then restart Igor. Absorbs T-signal-handlers (SIGTERM/SIGINT clean exit in main.py is part of this). context-load writes flag, savestate deletes it.
